name.value: How did Project Gutenberg begin, and grow? What motivated its founder, Michael Hart? What are some of the core beliefs?

value.value: How did Project Gutenberg begin, and grow? What motivated its founder, Michael Hart? What are some of the core beliefs?

name.value: Project Gutenberg has a long history, which predates the modern Internet and continues until today. The essays and documents in this section provide some of the background of Project Gutenberg, and also describe the basis for how Project Gutenberg operates.
